vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group-

triage_decision.reason: Adjusting permissions on /etc/group- is a straightforward file permission change that does not affect authentication, boot processes, or critical services. The recommended chmod command is safe and aligns with standard STIG hardening practices.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Potential mis-typing of the chmod command could set incorrect permissions
